scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c "#3b82f6,#10b981" "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.desktop: concurrently --kill-others -n server,client,electron -c "#3b82f6,#10b981,#f59e0b" "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.build:desktop: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && npm run build:server-bundle && npx electron-builder
scripts.dist:linux: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && npm run build:server-bundle && npx electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:mac: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && npm run build:server-bundle && npx electron-builder --mac
